prompt: High-detail top-down orthographic 2D texture/image asset for a classic military RTS battlefield terrain albedo map. Vertical 1:2 map composition. Dark heather grass base terrain with natural variation, dirt and asphalt roads crossing the map, shallow streams with muddy banks, rocky cliff bands and exposed stone ridges, ore/mineral field clusters as natural colored mineral deposits, concrete base-pad zones embedded in terrain, crater scars and worn battlefield ground. Pure terrain map only: no buildings, no vehicles, no infantry, no units, no UI, no text, no logos, no faction insignia, no copyrighted IP, no recognizable Command & Conquer / Red Alert / EA / GDI / Nod / Soviet / Allied references. Clean game-ready albedo/diffuse map, readable from RTS camera, high detail, cohesive hand-authored terrain layout, no perspective tilt.
